nodes.name: Gmail Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls Gmail inbox every 1 minute for new messages (Community Edition has no real-time push without GCP Pub/Sub).

nodes.name: Extract Email Fields
nodes.notes: Normalizes the Gmail trigger output into clean fields used downstream. Generates a ticket reference number.

nodes.name: Is Real Customer Email?
nodes.notes: Loop guard: drops any message sent FROM the support inbox itself (our own auto-replies) or whose subject already contains a TKT- reference, so the bot never replies to its own replies.

nodes.name: Groq Classify
nodes.notes: Calls Groq (OpenAI-compatible). temperature=0 + response_format json_object for deterministic strict JSON. neverError=true so the Code node can handle failures gracefully.

nodes.name: Parse Groq Response
nodes.notes: Defensive JSON parsing. Never throws — always emits {category, urgency, ...} defaulting to General/Low on error.

nodes.name: Route by Category
nodes.notes: Routes on category. Fallback output also goes to the General branch so nothing is ever dropped.

nodes.name: Build Slack Blocks
nodes.notes: Serializes Block Kit JSON safely via JSON.stringify so embedded \n in mrkdwn text round-trips correctly. Feeds Slack Alert (Urgent).

nodes.name: Slack Alert (Urgent)
nodes.notes: Posts a Block Kit alert to the support-lead channel for Urgent tickets.

nodes.name: Notion Ticket (Billing)
nodes.notes: Creates a ticket page directly via Notion's REST API (POST /v1/pages), bypassing the n8n Notion node's UI/version mismatch issues. Property names must exactly match the Notion database's column names and types.

nodes.name: Gmail Auto-Reply (General)
nodes.notes: Sends the FAQ auto-reply ONLY to General-category customers. HTML built in the Build Templates node.

nodes.name: Is General?
nodes.notes: Gates the FAQ auto-reply so only General-category tickets receive it, even though this branch now sees all categories after the merge.

nodes.name: Build Templates & Merge
nodes.notes: Receives all 3 Switch branches (after their category-specific action) and produces HTML + log fields for the universal steps.

nodes.name: Gmail Confirmation (All)
nodes.notes: Universal confirmation email sent to every customer regardless of category.

nodes.name: Map Fields for Sheet
nodes.notes: Renames internal field names to match the exact Google Sheet column headers (Timestamp, Sender, Subject, Category, Urgency, Status, Notes) so 'Map Automatically' in the Sheets node matches correctly. includeOtherFields=false drops all other fields so no stray columns get created.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends one row per ticket to the 'Logs' sheet tab.
